title: NeoLuckPerms Chat Plus
body:
This mod not only returns the functionality of **luckperms chat**!

## What the mod adds:
• Lockperms prefix support
• Separation of global and local chats
• Removes death messages in the local chat. To get rid of the flood

## Commands:

```
/achat show - Enables the admin panel to see messages in the local chat. With the prefix [Spy]
/achat off/on - Enables or disables the separation of global and local chats
/achat radius get - Returns the current radius of the local chat
/achat radius set - Changes the radius of the local chat. It is not saved in the config. Only in online mode. After restarting the server, it will return to the value from the config.
/achat death get - Returns the current radius of the death message
/achat death set - Changes the radius of the death message. It is not saved in the config. Only in online mode. After restarting the server, it will return to the value from the config.
```

## Permissions:

```
command.achat.show - /achat show
command.achat.off -  /achat off
command.achat.on -  /achat on
command.death  - /achat death
command.death.get - /achat death get
command.death.set - /achat death set
command.radius - /achat radius
command.radius.get - /achat radius get
command.radius.set - /achat radius set
```
